chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-861 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 30-04-2024 Mr. Rashid Khan Durrani, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** It appears that application of applicant for registration of FIR against proposed accused/respondents was dismissed by Justice of Peace/II-Additional Sessions Judge, Sukkur on the ground that there was no medical certificate in support of injuries allegedly caused by respondents to the victims. Learned Deputy P.G submits that he has received copies of medical certificates of injured Altaf, Hafiz Muhammad Mazhar and Abdul Basit from Advocate of applicant, which prima facie show that he had sustained injuries falling under Shajjah-i-Khafifah, Shajjah-i- Hashimah etc. Accordingly, with consent, impugned order is set aside and the matter is remanded back to the same Court to hear the parties afresh and get the certificate verified from concerned quarter and pass order in accordance with law. This Crl. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
